task: Advanced high-value task: Options Parity Quote Set Acceptance Criteria Rewrite. Scenario: a review committee needs a row-level exception analysis with no inferred or fabricated inputs for options parity quote set. Embedded packet: Records: R1 call_mid=25 put_mid=49 strike=8; R2 call_mid=34 put_mid=45 strike=11; R3 call_mid=20 put_mid=60 strike=7. Remediation options: O1 changes call_mid by -12% cost=68000; O2 changes put_mid by -18% cost=88400; O3 changes strike by -25% cost=49600; max_budget=112800. Rules and constraints: put-call parity residual above 0.75 indicates stale quote; calls should decline with strike; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: create a validation checklist and fill it using the supplied records, citing the exact values behind each pass or failure. Deliver options_parity_4.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
